song.title: Lord, You Are Good
song.author: Israel Houghton
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E B/E D/E A/E .E B/E D/E A/E Lord, You are good and Your mercy endureth forever (2x)| .A B/A People from every nation and tongue .Am7 D/A From generation to generation [C] . E B D A We worship You, Hallelujah, Hallelujah . E B C D We worship You, for who You are . E B D A We worship You, Hallelujah, Hallelujah . E/G# B7 C2 D We worship You, for who You are
[T] . E5-G5-A5 You are good, all the time . E5-D5-C#5 All the time, You are good . E5-G5-A5 You are good, all the time . E5-D5-C#5 (C5-B5) All the time, You are good.
